subcodes.title: Tablet of the Hair 6
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to Him Who made the darkness an embellishment of the light, with which He adorned the Beauty of Revelation
subcodes.first_line_orig: و الحمد لمن جعل الظلمه طراز النور و به زین جمال الظهور و هذا من قدره ماسبقه
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
